implementation_cross_check.source_role: MMB implementation cross-check only; not paper-side mathematical source

notes: Primary OCR Markdown contains the model-economy section, household and entrepreneur constraints, banking FOCs, market clearing, log-linearization statement, calibration table, and shock process information.
No PDF body was opened; raw PDF existence was checked only for provenance.
Price and wage Phillips-curve normalizations and the capital-producer Tobin's q FOC require source-level formula review before status promotion.
Implementation cross-check confirms log/exp implementation form, variable names, shock names, and blocks, but was not treated as paper-side mathematical evidence.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
